_comment: Frozen baselines for Phase 10 acceptance harness. Re-derive via 'git show <baseline_loc_commit>:<file> | wc -l'; do not edit at harness runtime.
metric_loc_definition_post_reframe: Pre + src/llm_runner.py (Phase 2 abstraction added net code)
_synthesized_baseline_rationale: Pre-Phase-2 prompt rendering used Step2-embedded design_doc + Step5 full diff. PRD evidence (8-15 KiB per prompt artifact * 5 steps + iteration_note copy * N rounds) places a single-round baseline at 50-70 KiB. We pick 60 KiB as the midpoint. Harness measures current; PASS if current <= 60_000 * 0.60 = 36_000 bytes.
